channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Football Is Freedom': Bob Marley Inspires Jamaica's Kits Ahead of World Cup
item.description: Jamaica's newest football kits celebrate both Bob Marley's life and the rich musical tradition of the island nation.

item.title: Phillies Manager Rob Thomson 'Proud' Nick Castellanos Admitted Beer Incident
item.description: Phillies manager Rob Thomson said he was "proud" of the recently released Nick Castellanos for owning his dugout beer incident.

item.title: Texas Coach Vic Schaefer Rips Team After Vanderbilt Loss: 'We Have No Heart'
item.description: Texas coach Vic Schaefer called the Longhorns "soft" after they lost to Vanderbilt on their home floor, 86-70.

item.title: Travis Kelce Playing, Taylor Swift Rumors Spike Pebble Beach Ticket Sales $60K
item.description: Travis Kelce is playing in the Pebble Beach Pro-am, and there was a spike on ticket sales amid rumors his fiancé Taylor Swift would attend.

item.title: Justin Verlander on Tigers' Reunion: 'I Thought There Was a Chance I Come Back'
item.description: Now back with the Detroit Tigers, Justin Verlander discussed on Thursday how he felt a reunion was always possible.

item.title: Paul announces NBA retirement after 21 seasons
item.description: Chris Paul announced his retirement from the NBA via a social media post Friday. Paul had previously said he would retire at the end of this season, h...

item.title: Grateful Naumov: 'Hope I made everyone proud'
item.description: The last conversation that Maxim Naumov had with his parents was about following in their footsteps to the Olympics.

item.title: Phillies manager 'proud' of Castellanos admission
item.description: A day after the Phillies released Nick Castellanos, manager Rob Thomson said Friday he was "proud" that the outfielder owned up to his mistake of brin...

item.title: Vonn set for 4th surgery, eyes U.S. return after
item.description: American skier Lindsey Vonn says she will have another surgery on her broken left leg Saturday in Italy and that she hopes to "go back home" soon afte...

item.title: Free agent Beasley to play for Bad Bunny in PR
item.description: Free agent Malik Beasley has signed a deal to play in Puerto Rico for Grammy Award-winning artist Bad Bunny's team, Santurce Crabbers, both parties to...
